name: ai-native-video-editor
description: An open-source video editor built to be operated by AI, not humans. Exposes itself as an MCP server so any MCP-compatible AI client can drive real, local FFmpeg-based edits.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aive/core --workspace @aive/mcp && npm run build:renderer --workspace synthcut-by-relo
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/mcp && npm run typecheck --workspace synthcut-by-relo
